entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop studied for disease resistance to Ascochyta blight.

entities.name: ASCOCHYTA BLIGHT
entities.description: A fungal disease that affects chickpea crops.

entities.name: ILC 464
entities.description: A chickpea cultivar identified as susceptible to Ascochyta blight.

entities.name: ILC 482
entities.description: A chickpea cultivar identified as having rate-reducing resistance to Ascochyta blight.

entities.name: ILC 3279
entities.description: A chickpea cultivar identified as having rate-reducing resistance to Ascochyta blight.

entities.name: RATE-REDUCING RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant cultivar to slow the progress of a disease infection.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The measure of grain production per unit area.

entities.name: APPARENT INFECTION RATE
entities.description: A metric (r) used to quantify the progress of disease infection to identify resistance.

entities.name: FIELD EXPERIMENT
entities.description: A research study conducted in a field setting over multiple crop years.

entities.name: SYRIA
entities.description: The country where the field experiments were conducted.

entities.name: ICARDA
entities.description: The International Center for Agricultural Research in the Dry Areas, the institution where the study was conducted.
